creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
1) The release has no other changes besides the linked bug. I've added a link to the release tag on Github which reflects this.

2) The patch appeared to apply without problems on recent HEAD ports tree on my dev machine, and was pasted in cleartext into the bugzilla submit field. I don't see how CRLF bytes could have gotten in it, and I'm not sure what to change.
